description:
Exposes DeepL translation and AI rephrasing as agent tools.
Translates text into a target language or rewrites it in a chosen style or tone via the DeepL API, returning the result plus the detected source language.

apikey.description: DeepL API key (from https://www.deepl.com/pro-api). A key ending in :fx is a Free-tier key and is routed to api-free.deepl.com automatically.
apikey.title: API Key

formality.description: Default formality for translation. Only honored by a subset of target languages; DeepL returns an error for unsupported ones, which the node surfaces.
formality.title: Formality

modelType.description: Translation model to request. Empty lets DeepL choose its default. quality_optimized favors quality, latency_optimized favors speed, prefer_quality_optimized uses quality where available and otherwise falls back.
modelType.title: Model Type

targetLang.description: Default target language for translation when the agent does not supply one. Regional variants are allowed (e.g. EN-US, EN-GB, PT-BR, PT-PT, ZH-HANS, ZH-HANT).
targetLang.title: Default Target Language

title: DeepL
